name: Backrooms || Infinite RPG
description:
The complete backrooms

350+ levels || 100+ unique NPCs & Entities || Unique events and mechanics

Included in this bot is nearly every level, positive, negative or enigmatic, NPCs, special events and more. what kind of story will you make, born here? accidentally fell out of bounds? or something else entirely, this is a story about survival, escape or death depending on where you go.

About the Project

This bot is an extremely ambitious passion project to create the largest and most expansive backrooms experience on this site, i started this project as i could never really find a backrooms RPG that really felt "complete" to me (and none ever having negative levels), so i created this bot which attempts to be the ENTIRE setting, all levels, entities and so on, alongside the levels are a large number of fully developed NPCs which live in this world alongside you. Settlements you can stumble across and more. Every level has been thought out and meticulously put together over the span of months, and it is still going! This project is updated semi-frequently.

If you do not enjoy the many levels, or the wikis general insanity i have an alt version of this project here: Backrooms Infinite || Kane Pixels

The main lore is not 1:1 with either the wikidot or the fandom, i am using my own canon i wrote for this bot, which takes inspiration from both, taking what i like about each + my own alterations/tweaks and additions, it is separate from the wikis canon so if lore is different that is why.

PROXY RECOMMENDED, COMPLEX MECHANICS

Recommended to use a proxy with high memory or set larger context sizes in your chat settings, bot may be a bit token heavy with around ~4-7k tokens active at any time (the bot is mainly tested on deepseek)

DISCLAIMER: Potential horror and content warning!

Some locations will be lethal, your character can be injured or killed brutally, or some locations may be a bit graphic (ie: the hive)

💎 100 LIKES!! HOLY SHIT 💎

Holy FUCK 20k messages, ty everyone so much, all the support ive been getting on this project really means alot

big ole shoutout and thanks to bots like Backrooms RPG - (150+ levels) and Backrooms RPG w Lorebook (W.I.P) for the inspiration
